parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>20. <BIBL><TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE> noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT> gebunden, √† <PRIZE>12. Gulden</PRIZE></BIBL>, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL><TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE></BIBL>, zu vertauschen.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: The original XML contained a structural error in the second <BIBL> element. The closing </BIBL> tag was missing after the <PLACE> element, causing the subsequent text (', oder gegen einem neuen...') to be incorrectly nested within the bibliographic entry. I have closed the <BIBL> tag properly to maintain a valid hierarchical structure.
